overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (resembling GTA V) showing a stationary view of an outdoor restaurant patio in 'Lagonda Town.' The area features colorful string lights, large patio umbrellas, white plastic furniture, and wet reflective pavement, creating an atmospheric urban evening setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor restaurant patio with string lights and umbrellas

agents.ego_description: standing stationary, observing the quiet outdoor dining area at night

entered.detail: overhead string of multicolored lights (red, green, blue, yellow) stretching across the patio
large dark outdoor umbrella over seating area
second large outdoor umbrella adjacent to the first
white plastic tables and chairs arranged under the umbrellas
single-story commercial building with illuminated interior and exterior lights

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime view of an outdoor restaurant patio illuminated by colorful overhead string lights. Two large umbrellas cover white plastic tables and chairs arranged on wet reflective pavement. The commercial building in the background glows with warm interior lighting, while sparse trees are visible on the left. The scene is devoid of people, creating a quiet, atmospheric urban evening setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a quiet outdoor restaurant patio during a rainy urban evening. It begins with a static view of white plastic tables and chairs sheltered by large umbrellas, all illuminated by the glow of colorful overhead string lights. As the camera lingers, the wet pavement reflects the vibrant lights and the warm interior radiance emanating from the commercial building in the background. The scene remains still and devoid of people, emphasizing the solitude of the setting before the view settles on the sparse trees bordering the patio.
